Hello 你好[nee-how]!

I'm Wenheng "Sylvia" Gao, a human-centered designer and artist from UC Berkeley, aiming at making magnificent UI & UX.

Get in touch sylvia619@berkeley.edu

Background

I'm currently an undergraduate in my senior year at Art Practice Department, University of California, Berkeley. Prior to this, I was a student in Shoreline Community College, from where I transferred to UC Berkeley with an excellent academic performance.

As an designer, as well as an engineer, I enjoy bridging the gap between engineering and artistic design — combining my technical knowledge with my keen eye for design to create beautiful things. My goal is to always build applications that are scalable and efficient under the hood while providing engaging, pixel-perfect user experiences.

When I'm not in front of a computer screen, I'm probably drawing, playing the piano, or admiring jazz music.
